entry.title: IDC 80JSC022DA022 (P00010) awarded to AXIOM SPACE, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION REMOVES CLAUSES AND ENSURES COMPLIANCE WITH PCDS 25-01, 25-02, AND 20-09B.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: LEASE OR RENTAL OF EQUIPMENT- SPACE VEHICLES

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: GUIDED MISSILE AND SPACE VEHICLE MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
